578: impl eframe::App for ChatApp {
579:     fn ui(&mut self, ui: &mut egui::Ui, _frame: &mut eframe::Frame) {
580:         let ctx = ui.ctx().clone();
581:         self.process_events();
582: 
583:         if self.streaming || self.models_loading {
584:             ctx.request_repaint();
585:         }
586: 
587:         // Keyboard shortcuts
588:         let new_chat =
589:             ui.input(|i| i.key_pressed(egui::Key::N) && (i.modifiers.ctrl || i.modifiers.command));
590:         if new_chat {
591:             self.new_conversation();
592:         }
593: 
594:         // Top bar
595:         egui::Panel::top("top_bar").show_inside(ui, |ui| {
596:             ui.horizontal(|ui| {
597:                 let sidebar_icon = if self.show_sidebar { "◀" } else { "▶" };
598:                 if ui
599:                     .button(sidebar_icon)
600:                     .on_hover_text("Toggle sidebar")
601:                     .clicked()
602:                 {
603:                     self.show_sidebar = !self.show_sidebar;
604:                 }
605: 
606:                 ui.separator();
607:                 ui.label("Model:");
608:                 egui::ComboBox::from_id_salt("model_selector")
609:                     .selected_text(self.selected_model_name())
610:                     .show_ui(ui, |ui| {
611:                         for (i, model) in self.models.iter().enumerate() {
612:                             ui.selectable_value(&mut self.selected_model, i, model);
613:                         }
614:                     });
615: 
616:                 ui.separator();
617:                 ui.label("Endpoint:");
618: 
619:                 if self.saved_endpoints.len() > 1 {
620:                     let mut new_url = None;
621:                     egui::ComboBox::from_id_salt("endpoint_selector")
622:                         .selected_text(&self.base_url)
623:                         .width(200.0)
624:                         .show_ui(ui, |ui| {
625:                             for ep in &self.saved_endpoints {
626:                                 if ui
627:                                     .selectable_label(self.base_url == ep.url, &ep.url)
628:                                     .clicked()
629:                                 {
630:                                     new_url = Some(ep.url.clone());
631:                                 }
632:                             }
633:                         });
634:                     if let Some(url) = new_url {
635:                         self.base_url = url;
636:                         if !self.streaming {
637:                             self.fetch_models();
638:                         }
639:                     }
640:                 } else {
641:                     ui.add(egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut self.base_url).desired_width(200.0));
642:                 }
643: 
644:                 if ui
645:                     .add_enabled(!self.streaming, egui::Button::new("↻"))
646:                     .on_hover_text("Refresh models")
647:                     .clicked()
648:                 {
649:                     self.fetch_models();
650:                 }
651: 
652:                 if ui.button("+").on_hover_text("Manage endpoints").clicked() {
653:                     self.show_endpoints = !self.show_endpoints;
654:                 }
655: 
656:                 ui.separator();
657:                 
658:                 let context_sidebar_icon = if self.show_context_sidebar { "☰▶" } else { "☰◀" };
659:                 if ui
660:                     .button(context_sidebar_icon)
661:                     .on_hover_text("Toggle Context Sidebar")
662:                     .clicked()
663:                 {
664:                     self.show_context_sidebar = !self.show_context_sidebar;
665:                 }
666: 
667:                 let settings_label = if self.show_settings { "⚙ ▼" } else { "⚙" };
668:                 if ui
669:                     .button(settings_label)
670:                     .on_hover_text("Settings")
671:                     .clicked()
672:                 {
673:                     self.show_settings = !self.show_settings;
674:                 }
675: 
676:                 let theme_icon = if self.dark_mode { "☀" } else { "🌙" };
677:                 if ui
678:                     .button(theme_icon)
679:                     .on_hover_text("Toggle theme")
680:                     .clicked()
681:                 {
682:                     self.dark_mode = !self.dark_mode;
683:                     self.config.dark_mode = self.dark_mode;
684:                     apply_theme(&ctx, self.dark_mode);
685:                 }
686:             });
687: 
688:             // Endpoints manager
689:             if self.show_endpoints {
690:                 ui.separator();
691:                 ui.horizontal(|ui| {
692:                     ui.label("Add endpoint:");
693:                     ui.add(
694:                         egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut self.new_endpoint)
695:                             .hint_text("http://localhost:8080/v1")
696:                             .desired_width(250.0),
697:                     );
698:                     ui.label("API key:");
699:                     ui.add(
700:                         egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut self.new_endpoint_key)
701:                             .hint_text("(optional)")
702:                             .password(true)
703:                             .desired_width(150.0),
704:                     );
705:                     if ui.button("Add").clicked() && !self.new_endpoint.trim().is_empty() {
706:                         let url = self.new_endpoint.trim().to_string();
707:                         let api_key = if self.new_endpoint_key.trim().is_empty() {
708:                             None
709:                         } else {
710:                             Some(self.new_endpoint_key.trim().to_string())
711:                         };
712:                         if !self.saved_endpoints.iter().any(|ep| ep.url == url) {
713:                             self.saved_endpoints.push(Endpoint { url, api_key });
714:                         }
715:                         self.new_endpoint.clear();
716:                         self.new_endpoint_key.clear();
717:                     }
718:                 });
719:                 let mut to_remove = None;
720:                 let mut key_edit: Option<(usize, Option<String>)> = None;
721:                 for (i, ep) in self.saved_endpoints.iter().enumerate() {
722:                     ui.horizontal(|ui| {
723:                         ui.label(&ep.url);
724:                         let key_icon = if ep.api_key.is_some() { "🔑" } else { "🔒" };
725:                         let tooltip = if ep.api_key.is_some() {
726:                             "API key set — click to clear"
727:                         } else {
728:                             "No API key"
729:                         };
730:                         if ui.small_button(key_icon).on_hover_text(tooltip).clicked()
731:                             && ep.api_key.is_some()
732:                         {
733:                             key_edit = Some((i, None));
734:                         }
735:                         if self.saved_endpoints.len() > 1 && ui.small_button("✕").clicked() {
736:                             to_remove = Some(i);
737:                         }
738:                     });
739:                 }
740:                 if let Some((i, new_key)) = key_edit {
741:                     self.saved_endpoints[i].api_key = new_key;
742:                 }
743:                 if let Some(i) = to_remove {
744:                     let removed = self.saved_endpoints.remove(i);
745:                     if self.base_url == removed.url {
746:                         if let Some(first) = self.saved_endpoints.first() {
747:                             self.base_url = first.url.clone();
748:                         }
749:                         if !self.streaming {
750:                             self.fetch_models();
751:                         }
752:                     }
753:                 }
754:             }
755: 
756:             // Collapsible settings panel
757:             if self.show_settings {
758:                 ui.separator();
759:                 ui.horizontal(|ui| {
760:                     ui.label("System prompt:");
761:                 });
762:                 ui.add(
763:                     egui::TextEdit::multiline(&mut self.system_prompt)
764:                         .hint_text("You are a helpful assistant...")
765:                         .desired_rows(2)
766:                         .desired_width(f32::INFINITY),
767:                 );
768:                 ui.horizontal(|ui| {
769:                     ui.label("Temperature:");
770:                     ui.add(egui::Slider::new(&mut self.temperature, 0.0..=2.0).step_by(0.1));
771:                     ui.separator();
772:                     ui.checkbox(&mut self.use_max_tokens, "Max tokens:");
773:                     ui.add_enabled(
774:                         self.use_max_tokens,
775:                         egui::Slider::new(&mut self.max_tokens, 64..=16384).logarithmic(true),
776:                     );
777:                 });
778: 
779:                 ui.separator();
780:                 let mut fonts_changed = false;
781:                 ui.horizontal(|ui| {
782:                     ui.label("Font:");
783:                     ui.add(
784:                         egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut self.config.font_family)
785:                             .hint_text("default")
786:                             .desired_width(120.0),
787:                     );
788:                     ui.label("Size:");
789:                     if ui
790:                         .add(egui::Slider::new(&mut self.config.font_size, 8.0..=24.0).step_by(1.0))
791:                         .changed()
792:                     {
793:                         fonts_changed = true;
794:                     }
795:                 });
796:                 ui.horizontal(|ui| {
797:                     ui.label("Mono:");
798:                     ui.add(
799:                         egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut self.config.mono_font_family)
800:                             .hint_text("default")
801:                             .desired_width(120.0),
802:                     );
803:                     ui.label("Size:");
804:                     if ui
805:                         .add(
806:                             egui::Slider::new(&mut self.config.mono_font_size, 8.0..=24.0)
807:                                 .step_by(1.0),
808:                         )
809:                         .changed()
810:                     {
811:                         fonts_changed = true;
812:                     }
813:                 });
814:                 ui.horizontal(|ui| {
815:                     ui.label("UI scale:");
816:                     if ui
817:                         .add(egui::Slider::new(&mut self.config.ui_scale, 0.75..=2.0).step_by(0.05))
818:                         .changed()
819:                     {
820:                         ctx.set_zoom_factor(self.config.ui_scale);
821:                     }
822:                 });
823:                 if fonts_changed {
824:                     configure_fonts(&ctx, &self.config);
825:                 }
826: 
827:                 ui.horizontal(|ui| {
828:                     if ui.button("Save settings").clicked() {
829:                         self.config.dark_mode = self.dark_mode;
830:                         self.config.default_endpoint = self.base_url.clone();
831:                         self.config.system_prompt = self.system_prompt.clone();
832:                         self.config.temperature = self.temperature;
833:                         self.config.max_tokens = self.max_tokens;
834:                         self.config.use_max_tokens = self.use_max_tokens;
835:                         self.config.saved_endpoints = self.saved_endpoints.clone();
836:                         if let Err(e) = self.config.save() {
837:                             self.error = Some(format!("Failed to save settings: {e}"));
838:                         }
839:                     }
840:                     if ui.button("Reload config").clicked() {
841:                         self.reload_config(&ctx);
842:                     }
843:                     if ui.button("Reset to defaults").clicked() {
844:                         self.config = Config::default();
845:                         self.dark_mode = self.config.dark_mode;
846:                         self.base_url = self.config.default_endpoint.clone();
847:                         self.system_prompt = self.config.system_prompt.clone();
848:                         self.temperature = self.config.temperature;
849:                         self.max_tokens = self.config.max_tokens;
850:                         self.use_max_tokens = self.config.use_max_tokens;
851:                         self.saved_endpoints = self.config.saved_endpoints.clone();
852:                         configure_fonts(&ctx, &self.config);
853:                         ctx.set_zoom_factor(self.config.ui_scale);
854:                         apply_theme(&ctx, self.config.dark_mode);
855:                         if let Err(e) = self.config.save() {
856:                             self.error = Some(format!("Failed to save settings: {e}"));
857:                         }
858:                         self.fetch_models();
859:                     }
860:                 });
861:             }

parts.text:
All done. Clippy clean, builds clean. Here's the summary of changes:

### `src/api.rs`
- **`Usage` struct**: Renamed `total_cost` to `cost` to match the actual OpenRouter response JSON where cost lives inside the `usage` object (not at the root)
- **`ChatChunk` struct**: Removed the root-level `cost: Option<f64>` field — it was never being populated by the API
- **`stream_chat()`**: Removed the manual `chunk.cost -> usage.total_cost` merging logic since serde now deserializes `cost` directly into `Usage`

### `src/app.rs`
- **Added `session_cost: f64`** field to `ChatApp` — accumulates cost across all requests in the current app session
- **`process_events()`**: On each `UsageInfo`, adds `usage.cost` to `session_cost`
- **Context sidebar**: Replaced the hardcoded `$0.01/1k tokens` estimate with actual "Session Spend" (cumulative) and per-request cost from the API. Bumped display precision to 6 decimal places since API costs can be quite small.

The core bug was that OpenRouter returns `cost` inside the `usage` object in the final SSE chunk, but the code was looking for it at the root of the chunk — so it was always `None`.
ok session spend is "per chat" yeah? should we call it "thread spend" or something else? session spend is different for something like opencode bceause i can switch models in the same session.

Good point. In hChat you can also switch models mid-conversation, so "session" is ambiguous — it could mean the app's lifetime or the current conversation thread.

"Thread Spend" isn't bad but "thread" is a bit overloaded (concurrency). How about just "Chat Spend"? It maps directly to the concept already in the UI ("New Chat", conversation list, etc.).

But it's your app — quick pick:

questions.question: What should we call the cumulative cost tracker in the sidebar?

 [package]

-version = "0.4.0"
+version = "0.4.1"

 repository = "https://github.com/heath0xFF/hChat"
 
 [dependencies]
 eframe = "0.34"
 egui_commonmark = "0.23"

 serde_json = "1"

 futures-util = "0.3"
 arboard = "3"

 dirs = "6"
 toml = "0.8"
 font-kit = "0.14.3"
 tiktoken-rs = "0.11.0"
 
 [package.metadata.deb]
 maintainer = "Heath"
 section = "net"
 depends = "$auto"
 assets = [
     ["target/release/hchat", "usr/bin/", "755"],
 ]
 
 [package.metadata.bundle]
 name = "hChat"
 identifier = "com.heath.hchat"
 category = "Utility"
 
 [profile.release]
 strip = true
 
 [profile.dist]
 inherits = "release"
 opt-level = "s"
 lto = true

git add src/api.rs src/app.rs Cargo.toml Cargo.lock && git commit -m "fix: use actual OpenRouter cost from usage object instead of hardcoded estimate

The cost field was being looked for at the root of the SSE chunk, but
OpenRouter returns it inside the usage object. Renamed Usage.total_cost
to Usage.cost to match the API response. Added cumulative per-chat spend
tracking in the context sidebar. Bump to 0.4.1." && git status
